result.summary: SportsDataIO exposes a large set of sports REST APIs documented with OpenAPI specs for multiple leagues and products; authentication is via a SportsDataIO API subscription key sent either as `Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key` header or `key` query parameter.
result.description: SportsDataIO provides sports data feeds and APIs for scores, statistics, play-by-play, fantasy, betting, news, and related sports information across many leagues. Its products are used to integrate real-time and historical sports datasets into applications and services.

sportsdata_api_key.label: SportsDataIO API subscription key
sportsdata_api_key.setup: Start from the [SportsDataIO developer getting started page](https://sportsdata.io/developers), which says you need an API subscription key before testing. The easiest public acquisition path is the [free trial page](https://sportsdata.io/free-trial) to request a trial key; paid access is also arranged through SportsDataIO sales as referenced by the developer pages. Use the issued key either as the `key` query parameter or in the `Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key` HTTP header, per the API documentation pages.
